1	import type * as DMMF from '@prisma/dmmf'
2	
3	/** Maps a Prisma scalar type name to its TypeScript equivalent. */
4	function scalarToTs(type: string): string {
5	  switch (type) {
6	    case 'Int':
7	    case 'Float':
8	    case 'Decimal':
9	    case 'BigInt':
10	      return 'number'
11	    case 'String':
12	      return 'string'
13	    case 'Boolean':
14	      return 'boolean'
15	    case 'DateTime':
16	      return 'Date'
17	    case 'Json':
18	      return 'Record<string, unknown>'
19	    case 'Bytes':
20	      return 'Uint8Array'
21	    default:
22	      return 'unknown'
23	  }
24	}
25	
26	/** Returns the TypeScript base type for a DMMF field (without list brackets or nullability). */
27	function fieldToTs(field: DMMF.Field): string {
28	  let base: string
29	  if (field.kind === 'scalar') {
30	    base = scalarToTs(field.type)
31	  } else if (field.kind === 'enum' || field.kind === 'object') {
32	    base = field.type
33	  } else {
34	    base = 'unknown'
35	  }
36	  return field.isList ? `${base}[]` : base
37	}
38	
39	function generateEnum(e: DMMF.DatamodelEnum): string {
40	  const values = e.values.map((v) => `  ${v.name} = '${v.dbName ?? v.name}',`).join('\n')
41	  return `export enum ${e.name} {\n${values}\n}`
42	}
43	
44	/**
45	 * Generates a TypeScript interface for a Prisma model.
46	 *
47	 * Relation fields are optional because REST APIs may or may not inline nested
48	 * data. Scalar/enum fields that are not required get a `| null` suffix.
49	 */
50	function generateModelInterface(model: DMMF.Model): string {
51	  const lines = model.fields.map((field) => {
52	    if (field.kind === 'object') {
53	      return `  ${field.name}?: ${fieldToTs(field)}`
54	    }
55	    const tsType = fieldToTs(field)
56	    const suffix = field.isRequired ? '' : ' | null'
57	    return `  ${field.name}: ${tsType}${suffix}`
58	  })
59	  return `export interface ${model.name} {\n${lines.join('\n')}\n}`
60	}
61	
62	/**
63	 * Generates a `WhereUniqueInput` type scoped to the model's `@id` field.
64	 * Falls back to `Record<string, unknown>` for models without a single-column
65	 * primary key (e.g., composite keys).
66	 */
67	function generateWhereUniqueType(model: DMMF.Model): string {
68	  const idField = model.fields.find((f) => f.isId)
69	  if (!idField) {
70	    return `export type ${model.name}WhereUniqueInput = Record<string, unknown>`
71	  }
72	  return `export type ${model.name}WhereUniqueInput = { ${idField.name}: ${scalarToTs(idField.type)} }`
73	}
74	
75	/**
76	 * Generates a typed CRUD client class for a single Prisma model.
77	 *
78	 * Assumes a REST API with conventional resource paths (`/<modelName-lowercase>s`).
79	 * Uses the native `fetch` API (available in Node 18+).
80	 */
81	function generateModelClient(model: DMMF.Model): string {
82	  const name = model.name
83	  const resource = `${name.toLowerCase()}s`
84	  const idField = model.fields.find((f) => f.isId)
85	  const idName = idField?.name ?? 'id'
86	  const whereType = `${name}WhereUniqueInput`
87	
88	  return `export class ${name}Client {
89	  readonly #config: RestClientConfig
90	
91	  constructor(config: RestClientConfig) {
92	    this.#config = config
93	  }
94	
95	  async findMany(params?: { skip?: number; take?: number; where?: Partial<${name}> }): Promise<${name}[]> {
96	    const url = new URL(\`\${this.#config.baseUrl}/${resource}\`)
97	    if (params?.skip !== undefined) url.searchParams.set('skip', String(params.skip))
98	    if (params?.take !== undefined) url.searchParams.set('take', String(params.take))
99	    const response = await fetch(url.toString(), { headers: this.#config.headers })
100	    return response.json() as Promise<${name}[]>
101	  }
102	
103	  async findUnique(params: { where: ${whereType} }): Promise<${name} | null> {
104	    const response = await fetch(
105	      \`\${this.#config.baseUrl}/${resource}/\${params.where.${idName}}\`,
106	      { headers: this.#config.headers },
107	    )
108	    if (response.status === 404) return null
109	    return response.json() as Promise<${name}>
110	  }
111	
112	  async create(params: { data: Omit<${name}, '${idName}'> }): Promise<${name}> {
113	    const response = await fetch(\`\${this.#config.baseUrl}/${resource}\`, {
114	      method: 'POST',
115	      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', ...this.#config.headers },
116	      body: JSON.stringify(params.data),
117	    })
118	    return response.json() as Promise<${name}>
119	  }
120	
121	  async update(params: { where: ${whereType}; data: Partial<Omit<${name}, '${idName}'>> }): Promise<${name}> {
122	    const response = await fetch(
123	      \`\${this.#config.baseUrl}/${resource}/\${params.where.${idName}}\`,
124	      {
125	        method: 'PATCH',
126	        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', ...this.#config.headers },
127	        body: JSON.stringify(params.data),
128	      },
129	    )
130	    return response.json() as Promise<${name}>
131	  }
132	
133	  async delete(params: { where: ${whereType} }): Promise<${name}> {
134	    const response = await fetch(
135	      \`\${this.#config.baseUrl}/${resource}/\${params.where.${idName}}\`,
136	      { method: 'DELETE', headers: this.#config.headers },
137	    )
138	    return response.json() as Promise<${name}>
139	  }
140	}`
141	}
142	
143	/** Generates the root `PrismaRestClient` class with one accessor per model. */
144	function generateMainClient(models: readonly DMMF.Model[]): string {
145	  const getters = models
146	    .map((m) => {
147	      const prop = m.name.charAt(0).toLowerCase() + m.name.slice(1)
148	      return `  get ${prop}(): ${m.name}Client {\n    return new ${m.name}Client(this.#config)\n  }`
149	    })
150	    .join('\n\n')
151	
152	  return `export class PrismaRestClient {
153	  readonly #config: RestClientConfig
154	
155	  constructor(config: RestClientConfig) {
156	    this.#config = config
157	  }
158	
159	${getters}
160	}`
161	}
162	
163	/**
164	 * Generates the full content of `rest-client.ts` from Prisma DMMF data.
165	 *
166	 * The output is a self-contained TypeScript file containing:
167	 * - Enum declarations
168	 * - Model interfaces
169	 * - Per-model CRUD client classes (using `fetch`)
170	 * - A root `PrismaRestClient` orchestrator with typed accessors
171	 */
172	export function generateRestClient(
173	  models: readonly DMMF.Model[],
174	  enums: readonly DMMF.DatamodelEnum[],
175	): string {
176	  const parts: string[] = []
177	
178	  parts.push(
179	    '// This file was auto-generated by @prisma/generator-rest-client.',
180	    '// Do not edit it manually.',
181	    '/* eslint-disable */',
182	    '',
183	  )
184	
185	  for (const e of enums) {
186	    parts.push(generateEnum(e), '')
187	  }
188	
189	  for (const model of models) {
190	    parts.push(generateModelInterface(model), '')
191	  }
192	
193	  parts.push('export interface RestClientConfig {', '  baseUrl: string', '  headers?: Record<string, string>', '}', '')
194	
195	  for (const model of models) {
196	    parts.push(generateWhereUniqueType(model))
197	  }
198	  parts.push('')
199	
200	  for (const model of models) {
201	    parts.push(generateModelClient(model), '')
202	  }
203	
204	  parts.push(generateMainClient(models), '')
205	
206	  return parts.join('\n')
207	}
208

Everything looks correct. Here's a summary of all the changes made:

---

## Implementation complete

### 8 new files created

| File | Description |
|---|---|
| `packages/generator-rest-client/.gitignore` | Standard pattern: ignores `node_modules`, `dist/`, `*.tsbuildinfo` |
| `packages/generator-rest-client/package.json` | `@prisma/generator-rest-client` with `bin: {"prisma-generator-rest-client": "dist/index.js"}`, deps on `@prisma/generator-helper` + `@prisma/dmmf` |
| `packages/generator-rest-client/tsconfig.json` | Extends `../../tsconfig.json` |
| `packages/generator-rest-client/tsconfig.build.json` | Extends `../../tsconfig.build.regular.json`, outputs to `dist/` |
| `packages/generator-rest-client/helpers/build.ts` | esbuild CJS bundle with an `onEnd` plugin that prepends `#!/usr/bin/env node` and `chmod +x`s the output |
| `packages/generator-rest-client/src/index.ts` | Calls `generatorHandler` with `onManifest` (returns pretty name + default output path) and `onGenerate` (delegates to `generate()`) |
| `packages/generator-rest-client/src/generator.ts` | Resolves output dir from `options.generator.output.value`, calls `generateRestClient`, writes `rest-client.ts` |
| `packages/generator-rest-client/src/template.ts` | Pure string-generation helpers: `scalarToTs`, `fieldToTs`, `generateEnum`, `generateModelInterface`, `generateWhereUniqueType`, `generateModelClient`, `generateMainClient`, and the exported `generateRestClient` |

### 1 file modified

**`tsconfig.build.bundle.json`** — added `"@prisma/generator-rest-client": ["./packages/generator-rest-client/src"]` to `compilerOptions.paths` for IDE go-to-definition support.

### Build & use
```bash
# Build the generator
pnpm --filter @prisma/generator-rest-client build

# Use in a Prisma schema
generator restClient {
  provider = "prisma-generator-rest-client"
  output   = "./generated/rest-client"
}
```
